## Claims

1. SVP predict catches ValidationError and prints friendly field-level errors instead of raw traceback
2. SVP trace catches ValidationError with same friendly handler
3. SVP probe catches ValidationError with same friendly handler
4. SVP ownership catches ValidationError with same friendly handler
5. Unicode em-dashes replaced with ASCII -- in SVP status output for Windows compatibility
6. No existing tests were modified or deleted during this change.
7. aiv close extracts real claims from Layer 1 evidence files instead of generic boilerplate
8. aiv close extracts Class B file references from evidence files to fix E016 warnings
9. aiv close detects actual evidence classes (A-F) present in each evidence file
10. aiv generate scopes ruff to staged Python files when available, falls back to full src/tests/

## Verification Methodology

**Zero-Touch Mandate:** Verifier inspects artifacts only.
Evidence was collected by `aiv commit` during the change lifecycle.
Packet generated by `aiv close`.

---

## Known Limitations

- Evidence references point to Layer 1 evidence files at specific commit SHAs.
  Use `git show <sha>:.github/aiv-evidence/<file>` to retrieve.
